title: Ubiquiti UACC-Adapter-PT-120W - PowerTransport adapter 27V, 120W
description: Original Ubiquiti transport power adapter UACC-Adapter-PT-120W with EU socket plug, atypical 2-pin PowerTransport connector designed to power specific Ubiquiti devices (UISP Box, UISP Power, UISP Router and UISP Switch) with output voltage 27V DC . The power adapter has a maximum power of 120W with a maximum output current of 4.44A . Only the AC input power cable is part of the package. The output PowerTransport cable is not included in the package and must be ordered separately GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
